technologies.name: Assembler
technologies.description: Unlocks Assembler building which allows automatic creation of more complicated items. Assembler will start consuming items if recipe is selected and one of the required for it items is present over assembler. It will produce and output desired product if all required items have been collected.

technologies.name: Overhead Conveyor
technologies.description: Unlocks Overhead Conveyorbelts that allow items to travel over other conveyorbelts on the ground. Overhead conveyorbelts can only be placed in a straight line. They will pick up an item from the starting tile and drop it 1 tile behind the end of conveyor

technologies.name: Mechanical Parts
technologies.description: Unlocks recipe for creating Mechanical Parts

technologies.name: Basic Electronics
technologies.description: Unlocks recipes for creating Basic Electronics and Cables

technologies.name: Steel Production
technologies.description: Unlocks recipe for creating Steel Bars in furnace

technologies.name: Industrial Research Pack
technologies.description: Unlocks recipe for creating Industrial Research Pack

technologies.name: Oil Extraction
technologies.description: Unlocks Pumpjack and Rafinery buildings that are required for extracting and processing oil. Unlocks recipes required for processing oil and creating plastic. Unlocks pipes that are required to transport liquids between buildings.

technologies.name: Engine
technologies.description: Unlocks recipe for creating Engine

technologies.name: Conveyor Belt Speed
technologies.description: Increases ConveyorBelt speed by 50%

technologies.name: Mining Speed
technologies.description: Increases mining speed by 20%

technologies.name: Miner Extender
technologies.description: Unlocks Miner Extender building which allows to boost output of a miner if it is placed on an ore. Extenders must face the miner or another extender to work properly. They can be chained together to boost miner production multiple times.

technologies.name: Advanced Circut
technologies.description: Unlocks recipes for creating PCB and Advanced Circuts

technologies.name: Engeenering Research Pack
technologies.description: Unlocks recipe for creating Engeenering Research Pack

technologies.name: Sulfur Processing
technologies.description: Unlocks recipe for creating Sulphuric Acid

technologies.name: Low Density Structure
technologies.description: Unlocks recipe for creating Low Density Structure

technologies.name: Electric Motor
technologies.description: Unlocks recipe for creating Electric Motor

technologies.name: Production Speed
technologies.description: Increased production speed in furnaces and assemblers by 20%

technologies.name: Processor
technologies.description: Unlocks recipe for creating Processors

technologies.name: Advanced Research Pack
technologies.description: Unlocks recipe for creating Advanced Research Pack

technologies.name: Conveyor Belt Speed 2
technologies.description: Increases ConveyorBelt speed by 50%

technologies.name: Conveyor Belt Speed 3
technologies.description: Increases ConveyorBelt speed by 50%

technologies.name: Assembling Productivity
technologies.description: Furnaces and assemblers will produce 10% more output products requiring the same amount of input items

technologies.name: Rocket Fuel
technologies.description: Unlocks recipe for creating Rocket Fuel

technologies.name: Computer
technologies.description: Unlocks recipe for creating Computers

technologies.name: Rocket Assembly
technologies.description: Unlocks Rocket Silo building which allows to launch a rocket after providing required parts

technologies.description: Increases ConveyorBelt speed by 50%
